penalties.description: Task appears incomplete - final suture cutting phase and slit closure assessment cannot be confirmed from the visible frames.

score_components.formula_applied: automatic zero due to auto-fail penalty

reasoning: Major disagreement between models on task completion status. Claude identified incomplete task with missing suture cutting phase, while GPT-4o reported full completion. Given the severity of incomplete task penalties in FLS scoring and Claude's specific identification of missing final phases, the incomplete assessment takes precedence. The longer completion time from Claude is used as it aligns with the incomplete task finding.
